caption: The video features a close-up of the Ukrainian flag waving vigorously in the wind against a cloudy sky. The flag, with its distinctive blue and yellow horizontal stripes, is prominently displayed on a flagpole. The words "Hero Ukraine" are superimposed on the blue stripe, emphasizing a message of support and solidarity. The fabric of the flag flutters dynamically, creating a sense of movement and energy. The overall scene conveys a strong sense of national pride and resilience, likely in the context of current events or a significant moment for Ukraine. The logo "13kanal" in the top right corner suggests that this footage may be part of a news broadcast or documentary segment.
